# Unused CSS class removal (2026-03-10 10:19Z)

_**User**_

Edit `d:\web development\test\src\pages\Agent.css` to remove unused CSS classes identified in the review.

Read the file first, then remove these CSS class definitions (the entire rule blocks):
1. `.agent-btn-answer` 
2. `.agent-btn-reject`
3. `.agent-incoming-actions`
4. `.incoming-placeholder`
5. `.btn-answer-demo`
6. `.contact-list`
7. `.recent-title`

Only remove these if they exist in the file. Use StrReplace to remove each block (replace with empty string). Be careful to include the full rule block including the selector and closing brace.
